name: Bourbon Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, whip together the cream, milk, pudding mix, and bourbon until well combined.
2. Refrigerate the mixture until it slightly thickens.
3. Serve over or beside slices of pie.
4. Makes 1 1/2 cups. Note: Combine the remaining half of the pudding mix with 1 cup of milk to make additional sauce as needed.
